name: @am-platform/automation
description: Terraform, Helm, and local infra for AM Platform

scripts.compose:logs: node scripts/run-with-logs.js docker compose -f ../docker-compose.yml logs -f keycloak
scripts.tf:keycloak:init: node scripts/run-with-logs.js python scripts/run_terraform.py keycloak init
scripts.tf:keycloak:plan: node scripts/run-with-logs.js python scripts/run_terraform.py keycloak plan
scripts.tf:keycloak:apply: node scripts/run-with-logs.js python scripts/run_terraform.py keycloak apply
scripts.tf:keycloak:output: node scripts/run-with-logs.js python scripts/run_terraform.py keycloak output
scripts.tf:billing:init: node scripts/run-with-logs.js python scripts/run_terraform.py billing init
scripts.tf:billing:plan: node scripts/run-with-logs.js python scripts/run_terraform.py billing plan
scripts.tf:billing:apply: node scripts/run-with-logs.js python scripts/run_terraform.py billing apply
scripts.tf:billing:output: node scripts/run-with-logs.js python scripts/run_terraform.py billing output
scripts.tf:notification:init: node scripts/run-with-logs.js python scripts/run_terraform.py notification init
scripts.tf:notification:plan: node scripts/run-with-logs.js python scripts/run_terraform.py notification plan
scripts.tf:notification:apply: node scripts/run-with-logs.js python scripts/run_terraform.py notification apply
scripts.tf:notification:output: node scripts/run-with-logs.js python scripts/run_terraform.py notification output
scripts.tf:ai-gateway:init: node scripts/run-with-logs.js python scripts/run_terraform.py ai-gateway init
scripts.tf:ai-gateway:plan: node scripts/run-with-logs.js python scripts/run_terraform.py ai-gateway plan
scripts.tf:ai-gateway:apply: node scripts/run-with-logs.js python scripts/run_terraform.py ai-gateway apply
scripts.tf:ai-gateway:output: node scripts/run-with-logs.js python scripts/run_terraform.py ai-gateway output
scripts.infra:vault:sync:preprod: node scripts/run-with-logs.js powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/vault-sync.ps1 -Env preprod -VaultAddr http://localhost:8200
scripts.infra:vault:sync:dev: node scripts/run-with-logs.js powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/vault-sync.ps1 -Env dev -VaultAddr http://localhost:8200
